projects.name: Job Fit Analyzer
description: Developed a Chrome extension using generative AI to analyze job descriptions, extract required skills, and automatically tailor resumes.
Built a Node.js backend with REST APIs to support resume parsing and customization workflows.
Implemented a cover letter generation feature with customizable templates and tone selection, increasing user engagement.
metrics: Reduced job application time by 5–10 minutes
Increased user engagement by 30%

projects.name: Placement Prediction System
description: Developed a web-based placement prediction system using Django framework with machine learning capabilities.
Built a classification model to predict student placement outcomes based on academic performance, stream, specialization, and work experience.
Implemented multiple ML algorithms including Random Forest, Decision Trees, and other classifiers to achieve optimal accuracy.
Created a user-friendly web interface for educational institutions to input student data and receive placement predictions.
Integrated data preprocessing pipelines and visualization tools using Seaborn and Matplotlib for model analysis.
metrics: Achieved 86% prediction accuracy using Random Forest algorithm
Processed 1,000+ student data points for model training
Reduced manual analysis time by 40 hours monthly through automation
Successfully deployed web interface for real-time predictions

projects.name: NYC Motor Vehicle Collisions Data Analysis
description: Conducted comprehensive analysis of NYC Motor Vehicle Collisions dataset, performing data cleaning, preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis.
Implemented data ethics assessment considering biases in data collection and representativeness across different communities.
Executed time series analysis to identify crash patterns by hour, day, and month, revealing peak crash times between 16:00-17:00.
Performed geospatial analysis to map crash distributions across boroughs, identifying Brooklyn as having the highest crash frequency.
Analyzed contributing factors including driver inattention, failure to yield right-of-way, and following too closely as primary causes.
Created data visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn to illustrate crash trends, geographical patterns, and temporal distributions.
metrics: Analyzed comprehensive NYC collision dataset covering multiple years
Identified Brooklyn accounting for 35% of total crashes due to population density
Found 15% increase in crashes during peak evening hours (16:00-17:00)
Cleaned 85% of dataset by handling missing values and inconsistencies
Assessed data ethics implications for community representation

projects.name: Lane Detection using OpenCV
description: Developed a computer vision system for lane detection using OpenCV and image processing techniques.
Implemented region of interest (ROI) extraction to isolate lane areas from road images.
Applied masking techniques to filter out irrelevant image regions for accurate lane identification.
Created visualization tools using Matplotlib to display processed images and detected lanes.
metrics: Successfully isolated region of interest for lane detection
Applied binary masking for precise lane identification

projects.name: Fake News Classification Using LSTM
description: Developed an NLP-based fake news detection system using LSTM neural networks to classify news articles as real or fake.
Processed and analyzed a dataset of 44,000+ news articles from Reuters and unreliable sources for model training.
Implemented comprehensive data preprocessing including text cleaning, tokenization, and stopword removal using SpaCy and NLTK.
Built and trained an LSTM model achieving 85% accuracy in distinguishing authentic news from misinformation.
Created data visualization tools using Seaborn, Matplotlib, and WordCloud to analyze text patterns and model performance.
metrics: Achieved 85% accuracy in fake news classification
Processed 44,000+ news articles dataset
Reduced dataset noise by 30% through preprocessing
Successfully deployed predictive model for news authenticity verification

projects.name: Kabaddi Event Management App
description: Developed a full-stack web application for Kabaddi League management with React frontend and Spring Boot backend.
Implemented role-based access control with JWT authentication for admin and user functionalities using Spring Security.
Built comprehensive admin features for managing referees, teams, and venues with CRUD operations via REST APIs.
Created user-facing features for event booking, booking history viewing, and booking modifications with React and Axios.
Integrated MySQL database with Spring Data JPA for efficient data management and persistence.
metrics: Successfully improved Kabaddi League management efficiency
Enhanced user experience in online booking system
Simplified event management workflow
Implemented secure role-based authentication system

projects.name: Social Media Analytics Platform
description: Built a cross-platform analytics platform comparing engagement patterns across 4chan and Reddit with AI-powered insights.
Continuously ingests posts from selected 4chan boards and Reddit subreddits and persists them in TimescaleDB for time-series analysis.
Implemented separate collectors for 4chan and Reddit with cold-start and incremental crawling capabilities, ETL pipelines, and configurable source lists.
Uses Faktory for background job processing to enable long-running, hands-off ingestion and scoring workflows.
Integrates Google Perspective API for per-post toxicity scoring at ingest to enable moderation-aware analytics.
Designed dual PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB databases with SQLX/Rust migrations alongside Python tooling for reproducible deployments.
Implemented LangChain-based AI agents and CopilotKit integrations for natural language SQL queries and automated insight generation.
Developed backend APIs with FastAPI and a Next + TypeScript frontend with rich visualizations using ApexCharts and React Simple Maps.
Includes plotting and analysis utilities to generate activity snapshots, toxicity comparisons, keyword trends, and platform comparison dashboards.
metrics: Supports continuous ingestion across multiple 4chan boards and Reddit subreddits
Persists time-series data in TimescaleDB for efficient querying and analysis
Applies toxicity scoring at ingest using Perspective API to enable moderation-aware analytics
Built interactive dashboards for board/subreddit-level analytics and platform comparisons
Added AI agent for natural-language SQL queries enabling non-technical analysts to explore data
Provides migration scripts and repeatable deployment with Docker and Faktory workers

projects.name: Reddit & 4chan Knowledge-Graph RAG Index
description: Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that builds a knowledge graph from Reddit and 4chan discussions and enables natural-language question answering over structured knowledge.
Built incremental ingestion pipeline using timestamp-based checkpoints to fetch new posts and comments from PostgreSQL databases, preventing duplicate ingestion and ensuring safe restarts.
Extracted structured knowledge triplets (entities and relationships) using LLMs and stored them as nodes and relationships in Neo4j knowledge graph.
Developed graph-aware reasoning capabilities enabling analysis of how discussions differ across platforms, identifying recurring themes, and tracking narrative evolution over time.
Implemented query system allowing natural-language questions with LLM-generated answers grounded in explicit graph relationships and evidence.
metrics: Transformed unstructured social media discussions into structured, queryable knowledge graph
Enabled cross-platform discourse analysis and platform comparison capabilities
Implemented incremental data ingestion with checkpoint system for efficient updates
Preserved explicit relationships between concepts for improved interpretability

projects.name: AI Job Analyzer – Resume Screening & Live Job Matching on AWS
description: Built a cloud-native AI platform to semantically compare resumes with job descriptions using Sentence-BERT and cosine similarity.
Implemented a Streamlit UI for interactive resume upload, scoring, and missing-keyword suggestions to improve ATS fit.
Added real-time job scraping from LinkedIn using Playwright and BeautifulSoup to provide live job recommendations based on parsed skills.
Packaged infrastructure as Terraform code and deployed on AWS with EC2 + Application Load Balancer for scalable serving.
metrics: Semantic match scoring for resumes and job descriptions
Real-time LinkedIn scraping for live job recommendations
Scalable deployment on AWS using Terraform and Application Load Balancer

projects.name: Flask Chat Application with WebSockets and MongoDB
description: Built a real-time Flask chat application using WebSockets for live messaging and MongoDB for message persistence.
Containerized the Flask app and MongoDB with Docker and deployed to Kubernetes with a 3-replica Flask deployment for high availability.
Implemented scalable architecture using Kubernetes services and configuration for production-like orchestration.
metrics: Multi-replica deployment (3 replicas) for high availability
Persistent message storage in MongoDB
Containerized images published to Docker Hub

projects.name: Hashassin Password Cracking Suite
description: Built a Rust-based CLI for password generation, hash creation, and dump utilities with configurable algorithms and multithreading.
Implemented rainbow table generation and cracking workflows with deterministic file formats for hashes and tables.
Developed a TCP client-server system to upload rainbow tables and crack hash files remotely.
metrics: Supports multi-threaded password generation and cracking
Uploads and reuses rainbow tables for remote cracking sessions
Implements structured binary formats for hash and rainbow outputs
